steps.title: Find evidence for viewing time
steps.content: The underlined claim says people usually spend more time viewing art in a museum than online. Support should compare time spent in the two settings.

steps.title: Use the direct comparison
steps.content: B concerns whether other Kahlo works are online, C concerns museum visitor origins, and D concerns museum collections. A finding with about three minutes at the museum and one minute online directly supports the claim. The answer is A.
